indexdef: CREATE INDEX idx_product_options_moderate_skew_color_size_stock_product ON public.product_options_moderate_skew USING btree (color, size, stock_status, product_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_product_options_moderate_skew_product_id_benchmark_export ON public.product_options_moderate_skew USING btree (product_id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX product_options_moderate_skew_pkey ON public.product_options_moderate_skew USING btree (id)

CREATE INDEX idx_products_moderate_skew_active_cat_brand_review ON public.products_moderate_skew USING btree (category_id, brand_id, review_count DESC, id DESC) WHERE ((status)::text = 'ACTIVE'::text)
CREATE INDEX idx_products_moderate_skew_active_created ON public.products_moderate_skew USING btree (created_at DESC, id DESC) WHERE ((status)::text = 'ACTIVE'::text)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX products_moderate_skew_pkey ON public.products_moderate_skew USING btree (id)
